item.title: Golden State Medical Supply Inc.: Primidone Tablets, USP, 250 mg, 100-count bottle, RX only, Recall
item.product: Primidone Tablets, USP, 250 mg, 100-count bottle, RX only,
item.summary: Cross contamination with other products: API contaminated with trace amounts of Acemetacin API. Product details: Primidone Tablets, USP, 250 mg, 100-count bottle, RX only, Manufactured by: Lannett Company, Inc., Marketed by: GSMS, Incorporated, Camarillo, CA 93012. NDC 51407-638-01
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
